content:
type: SURVEY
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
note: Adding dry_run param to Image.save() (src/PIL/Image.py ~line 2469-2591): when dry_run=True, skip opening/writing the real file (write to an in-memory io.BytesIO instead) but still run save_handler so format conversion/validation errors surface. Also adding test_dry_run in Tests/test_image.py.

fields.note: Adding dry_run param to Image.save() (src/PIL/Image.py ~line 2469-2591): when dry_run=True, skip opening/writing the real file (write to an in-memory io.BytesIO instead) but still run save_handler so format conversion/validation errors surface. Also adding test_dry_run in Tests/test_image.py.

fields.region: save() method body (params parsing + write block)
fields.note: Proposed merge: dry_run writes to in-memory BytesIO and skips real file open/close/remove; backup/backup_suffix copy existing file before overwrite in the real-file branch. Let me know if your backup param names/defaults differ.
